claim: WHO estimates 700,000 premature deaths annually in Sub-Saharan Africa from household air pollution, predominantly among women and children under five, with PM2.5 exposures often exceeding 500 µg/m³ during cooking.
method: Reviewed WHO fact sheet burden estimates, exposure levels, and health effects.
limitations: Burden estimates are modeled, not directly measured at household level.
Exposure estimates smooth substantial within-country variation.
